2: task: generate_mujoco_xml
3: 
4: instructions: |
5:   Generate a valid MuJoCo XML model of a simple ideal pendulum using SI units.
6: 
7:   Coordinate system:
8:     +x = right
9:     +y = upward
10:     +z = out of page
11: 
12:   Pendulum definition:
13:     - Massless rod
14:     - Spherical bob
15:     - Single hinge joint
16: 
17:   Joint specifications:
18:     - Type: hinge
19:     - Location: [0, 1, 0]
20:     - Axis: [0, 0, 1]
21:     - Damping: 0
22:     - Friction: 0
23:     - No losses
24: 
25:   Rod:
26:     - Length: 0.2485 m
27:     - Mass: 0
28:     - Collision: disabled
29: 
30:   Bob:
31:     - Shape: sphere
32:     - Diameter: 0.1 m
33:     - Mass: 1.0 kg
34: 
35:   Environment:
36:     - Gravity: [0, -9.81, 0]
37: 
38:   Initial conditions:
39:     - Pendulum starts horizontal
40:     - Bob positioned along +x from hinge
41:     - Initial angle: +90 degrees from vertical
42:     - Initial angular velocity: 0 rad/s
43: 
44:   MuJoCo requirements:
45:     - Enable energy computation
46:     - Exactly one hinge joint
47:     - Joint rotates only about z-axis
48:     - Use SI units
49: 
50:   Acceptance criteria:
51:     - Exactly one hinge joint
52:     - Rod length = 0.2485 m
53:     - Rod mass = 0 kg
54:     - Bob mass = 1 kg
55:     - Gravity = [0, -9.81, 0]
56:     - Initial angle = +90 degrees
57:     - Initial angular velocity = 0
58:     - Energy computation enabled
59: 
60: output_format:
61:   type: xml
62:   constraints:
63:     - Return only valid MuJoCo XML
64:     - No explanations
65:     - No additional text

(End of file - total 65 lines)
</content>

display.text:
model: gemma-4-26b
task: generate_mujoco_xml

instructions: |
  Generate a valid MuJoCo XML model of a simple ideal pendulum using SI units.

  Coordinate system:
    +x = right
    +y = upward
    +z = out of page

  Pendulum definition:
    - Massless rod
    - Spherical bob
    - Single hinge joint

  Joint specifications:
    - Type: hinge
    - Location: [0, 1, 0]
    - Axis: [0, 0, 1]
    - Damping: 0
    - Friction: 0
    - No losses

  Rod:
    - Length: 0.2485 m
    - Mass: 0
    - Collision: disabled

  Bob:
    - Shape: sphere
    - Diameter: 0.1 m
    - Mass: 1.0 kg

  Environment:
    - Gravity: [0, -9.81, 0]

  Initial conditions:
    - Pendulum starts horizontal
    - Bob positioned along +x from hinge
    - Initial angle: +90 degrees from vertical
    - Initial angular velocity: 0 rad/s

  MuJoCo requirements:
    - Enable energy computation
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Joint rotates only about z-axis
    - Use SI units

  Acceptance criteria:
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Rod length = 0.2485 m
    - Rod mass = 0 kg
    - Bob mass = 1 kg
    - Gravity = [0, -9.81, 0]
    - Initial angle = +90 degrees
    - Initial angular velocity = 0
    - Energy computation enabled

output_format:
  type: xml
  constraints:
    - Return only valid MuJoCo XML
    - No explanations
    - No additional text

state.title: YAML_creation/Temperature_Testing/V8_Temp_0.3/test31/ChatGPT-5.3-Instant_Pend.YAML

input.content:
<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 0 -9.81" integrator="murphy" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>
    
    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.01" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <joint name="bob_joint" type="free"/>
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>
    
    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <geom name="rod" type="cylinder" size="0.01 0.12425" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>
